lp the astrologer in
rectifying birth time. Such rectification methods are actually
trying to locate a moment and patter that is very much tune
with the native and his chart. The logical validity and
importance of those mathematical methods also get
emphasized only when we accept the definition ofbirth time
as "Any one of the moments (during the span of birth) that is
very strongly related to the native". The acceptance of this
underlying principle not only makes acceptable all the rishi
hora supported birth times, but also the modem methods like
taking the 'time of cutting of umbilical cord' as birth time.
Since by now we have a conclusive answer to the question
"what is birth time?''. we should proceed further to clarify
how can we arrive at this "unique moment that is highly in
tune with the native's life and destiny", using the many
available mathematical methods provided to us by the sages.
